mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DMS_FOLDER (FAMILY_ID, FOLDER_NM, PARENT_SEQ, SORT_ORDER, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{folderNm}, #{parentSeq}, #{sortOrder}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DMS_FOLDER WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FOLDER_SEQ = #{folderSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DMS_FOLDER WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FOLDER_SEQ = #{folderSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DMS_FILE (FAMILY_ID, FOLDER_SEQ, FILE_NM, STORED_NM, FILE_SIZE, MIME_TYPE, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{folderSeq}, #{fileNm}, #{storedNm}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DMS_FILE WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DMS_FILE WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FILE_SIZE), 0) FROM DMS_FILE WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId}
SELECT * FROM DMS_FILE WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY UPD_DT DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM DMS_FOLDER WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND FOLDER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY UPD_DT DESC LIMIT 20
